sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92001" key="pwrolutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πωρο-λῠτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n92001.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">softening callosities</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:109" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">109</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
